is_well_founded[T](r) = forall(x0: T -> Bool) { exists(k0: T) { x0(k0) } implies exists(k1: T) { x0(k1) and forall(x1: T) { r(x1, k1) implies not x0(x1) } } }

not is_well_founded[T](r) or forall(x0: T -> Bool) { forall(x1: T) { not x0(x1) } or exists(k0: T) { x0(k0) and forall(x2: T) { not r(x2, k0) or not x0(x2) } } } = true
